- Moved the two user ID constants to globals/globals.go as they are used across multiple packages including IAM and daemon controller

## Next Steps
1. Update imports in internal/daemon/controller/auth/testing.go to use globals.AnyAuthenticatedUserId instead of perms.AnyAuthenticatedUserId

- The constants are used in ACL rules (anonymous user, authenticated users, recovery users) - they are global configuration values that should be accessible from multiple packages
- Any changes must maintain backward compatibility for existing code paths using these constants via the perms package before migration is complete

- globals/globals.go: Added new constants AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId (moved from perms)
- internal/perms/acl.go: Removed the old definition of AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId; added import from globals package
